evals.prompt: Stream PumpFun token prices in real time. I want to see a live feed with OHLC and volume for pump.fun tokens on Solana.
evals.expected_output: Subscribes to the Bitquery WebSocket (stream_pumpfun.py or inline gql subscription), uses Trading.Tokens subscription filtering Network=Solana and Address includesCaseInsensitive 'pump' with 1s duration, and streams formatted OHLC and USD volume for each PumpFun token tick in real time.

evals.prompt: I need a real-time PumpFun token feed with derived metrics — moving averages and percentage change per tick.
evals.expected_output: Runs the streaming script or subscription that returns OHLC, Volume, and Price.Average (Mean, SMA, EMA, WMA) for PumpFun tokens on Solana; optionally computes tick-to-tick % change and presents derived metrics on the stream.

evals.prompt: Subscribe to live pump.fun token data on Solana and show me the ticks as they come in.
evals.expected_output: Connects via WebSocket to Bitquery, subscribes to Trading.Tokens for Solana tokens with 'pump' in the address (1s ticks), and prints each formatted tick as it is streamed until the user stops or timeout.

evals.prompt: Give me a live Solana meme coin feed — specifically for tokens that are on pump.fun.
evals.expected_output: Uses the PumpFun token subscription (Network=Solana, Address contains 'pump') to stream real-time price data including token name, symbol, address, OHLC, and volume in USD.
